title: Multiple condition in automations

posts.author: vballas (Vagelis Ballas)
posts.cookedHtml:
I have a 2 Groups (Active / Inactive) and a Status field with 7 values.
I would like to have the Group changed automatically when the Staus is changed (3 values will move/keep in Inactive, the other 4 in Active).
I have managed to make it work but only by using 7 separate automations.
Is there a way to consolidate to 1 or max 2?

posts.author: DanIngham-IOI (Dan Ingham IOI / BPX)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @vballas
Welcome to the community
You should be able to do this with 2 Automations, by creating your own automation for when the status column changes and the status is not this, this or this then move here

Hope this provides what you need
If you need any additional help please let us know
Many thanks in advance
Dan

See both examples below to move to the 2 different groups
